name: finance-workbench
description: Persona workbenches for the Office of the CFO with an LLM-agnostic Office Hours harness.

scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:model && npm run test:adapter-sdk && npm run test:access && npm run test:sap && npm run test:console && npm run test:web
scripts.vercel:build: npm run build:harness && npm run build:console && npm run build:bundle
scripts.console: npm run build:harness && node --import tsx apps/console/server.ts
scripts.web: npm run build:harness && npm run build:access && npm --prefix apps/web run dev
scripts.build:web: npm run build:harness && npm run build:access && npm --prefix apps/web run build
